commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR renders commentary-phase assistant agent events as TUI progress, moves pending chat run tracking before `chat.send` resolves, and adds focused TUI tests plus a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +64, Tests +62, Docs +1. Total +127 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main's TUI `handleAgentEvent` has no item/preamble or assistant/commentary renderer, while current Codex app-server emits commentary progress as item/preamble events. I did not run a live TUI session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can attempt the narrow code/test refresh, but it must preserve the current-main TUI run-state fixes and avoid expanding into the separate delta-only projection PR.

target.title: [codex] Render TUI commentary progress events
target.body:
## Summary

- render `phase:"commentary"` assistant agent events in the TUI as live progress updates
- track `pendingChatRunId` before `chat.send` resolves so early Codex/OpenAI commentary can attach to the active run
- keep commentary out of final answers and chat history by leaving the existing final/history suppression path intact

## Root Cause

Codex/OpenAI progress notes arrive as assistant `agent` events with `phase:"commentary"`. The TUI only promoted normal chat deltas into visible assistant text, so commentary could be dropped before the first visible chat event. Claude appeared to work better because its visible thinking/tool streams exercised different TUI paths.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/tui/tui-event-handlers.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/tui/embedded-backend.test.ts` — passed, 3 files / 79 tests
- `OPENCLAW_LOCAL_CHECK=1 OPENCLAW_LOCAL_CHECK_MODE=throttled pnpm check:changed` — passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/tui/tui-event-handlers.ts src/tui/tui-event-handlers.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts` — passed
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD` — passed
- Source-backed TUI smoke: `HOME=/Users/gregclaw pnpm openclaw tui --local --session pr-77537-smoke --message "Smoke test for PR 77537..." --timeout-ms 120000` — completed against `e52ef9d`; the TUI moved through waiting/streaming/running and displayed final text exactly `TUI_COMMENTARY_SMOKE_DONE` without commentary text in the final answer

## Rebase Notes

- Rebased onto latest `origin/main` (`a4f2bf273a` at validation time)
- Resolved the only conflict in `CHANGELOG.md` by preserving both upstream entries and this PR's TUI/progress entry
- GitHub now reports the PR as mergeable
target.author: grosen
